case_title: SEYMOUR, ANN R. VS SIDUN, THOMAS: AGENT TO RECEIVE PROCESS FOR B OF A et al

docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
CERTIFIED LETTER TO TOMUS SIDUN C/O BANK OF AMERICA, RETURNED SIGNED.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,400.00 FILED BY SEYMOUR, ANN R. AS TO DEFENDANT SIDUN, THOMAS: AGENT TO RECEIVE PROCESS FOR B OF A BANK OF AMERICA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-21-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SEYMOUR, ANN R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA $300.00 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
